skill.name: claudemd-optimizer
skill.author: staticWagomU
skill.description: Optimize CLAUDE.md files based on Claude 4 best practices from Anthropic's official documentation. Use when reviewing or improving CLAUDE.md, creating new project instructions, analyzing prompt effectiveness, or applying Claude 4 model-specific optimizations. Triggers: "CLAUDE.mdを最適化", "プロジェクト指示を改善", "optimize CLAUDE.md", "review system prompt".
